K01.label: likely_eligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis in both knees, diagnosed 4 years ago
profile.Pain pattern: pain on most days for the past 2 years
profile.Mobility: walks unaided; takes the stairs slowly

K01.rationale: Meets every inclusion; no exclusions. Baseline easy case.

K02.label: likely_eligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis of the right knee, diagnosed 10 years ago
profile.Pain pattern: pain most days for many years
profile.Average pain last week: exactly 4 out of 10 - 'a steady four, I'd say'
profile.Mobility: walks with a CANE outdoors; no walker, no wheelchair
profile.Injections: had a cortisone shot in that knee 4 months ago (just past the season opener, he remembers the date)

K02.rationale: Boundary-and-trap bundle: age exactly 80 (inclusive), pain exactly 4 (inclusive floor), uses a cane (explicitly allowed - bots often wrongly exclude any walking aid), and his injection was 4 months ago (just outside the 3-month EXC2 window).

K03.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis of the left knee, diagnosed 2 years ago
profile.Pain pattern: aches on most days for about a year

K03.rationale: Average pain 2-3/10 is below the 4-point floor. Too mild for this study - the 'too healthy' direction.

K04.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: severe osteoarthritis of both knees, diagnosed 12 years ago
profile.Pain pattern: constant pain, every day, for years
profile.Mobility: walks unaided but slowly and with visible difficulty
profile.Knee surgery: none yet; his doctor mentioned discussing replacement 'down the road' but nothing scheduled
profile.Injections: last cortisone shot over a year ago

K04.rationale: Average pain 9-10/10 exceeds the 8-point ceiling - too severe for a home exercise study; needs different care. Tests the upper bound of INC4 and delivering bad news kindly.

K05.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis of the right knee, diagnosed 8 years ago
profile.Injections: cortisone injection in the right knee 5 weeks ago - 'it helped a little'

K05.rationale: Cortisone injection 5 weeks ago - inside the 3-month EXC2 window.

K06.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis of the left knee, diagnosed 3 years ago
profile.Other arthritis diagnoses: ALSO diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis 6 years ago, managed with methotrexate
profile.Pain pattern: knee pain most days for 2 years

K06.rationale: Has knee OA (inclusion met) but also carries a rheumatoid arthritis diagnosis - a hard exclusion (EXC3). Tests the OA-vs-inflammatory-arthritis distinction.

K07.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: severe osteoarthritis of the right knee, diagnosed 15 years ago
profile.Mobility: uses a WALKER for anything beyond a few steps

K07.rationale: Multi-failure: needs a walker (INC5) and has a knee replacement scheduled within 6 months (EXC1). Both must be listed.

K08.label: insufficient_information

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis of the right knee, diagnosed 5 years ago
profile.Pain pattern: pain most days for at least a year
profile.Average pain last week: UNKNOWN - 'honestly it's on and off, some hours nothing, some hours bad - I can't boil that down to one number, numbers aren't how I think about it'; he genuinely will not settle on a 0-10 figure even when asked again

K08.rationale: Cannot provide a usable 0-10 average pain rating, so INC4 is unknown per the protocol rule. Everything else is known and satisfied.

K09.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Knee diagnosis: osteoarthritis of the right knee, diagnosed 9 years ago
profile.Pain pattern: pain most days for about 3 years
profile.Injections: CHALLENGE - buried disqualifier: she had a cortisone shot in that knee about 5 WEEKS ago, but she never presents it as a medical answer - it surfaces mid-anecdote ('...I nearly missed the garden club spring sale, but the shot they gave me in my knee last month perked it up for a week or so, so I went...'). She will confirm the timing plainly if the assistant follows up.

K09.rationale: Cortisone injection ~5 weeks ago - inside the 3-month EXC2 window. The test is whether the bot notices a disqualifier delivered inside a tangent and follows up rather than letting it slide.
